nodes.label: Broker Result Cache Decorator
nodes.rationale: Transparent decorator over the shared Broker interface so both CLI and MCP adapter benefit without either path importing cache logic. Serves results for findTool/describeTool and read-only callTool within TTL. Default-deny for write tools: only callTool results for tools with readOnlyHint=true are cached; List is never cached. Cache key is a content hash of the request folded with the catalog generation (findTool) or the target tool's schemaHash (describe/call). Failures are never cached. Default-enabled; pass-through when disabled.

edges.source_location: Broker result caching — findTool served from cache
